channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gavin Newsom and media outlet team up for two bold takes on Elon becoming a trillionaire
Conservatives push for July 4 vote on Trump border policies
item.description: Hardline House conservatives are pushing to permanently enshrine President Donald Trump's border enforcement policies into federal law by July...

item.title: New York Democrats ignore warnings as Mamdani's government-run grocery scheme advances
DOJ approves Paramount's purchase of Warner Bros., but California AG Bonta refuses to let go
